description: Implemented agent-build-scaffold and agent-build-run from docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-agent-build-group.md. The scaffold renderer parses validated workflow blueprints and emits Claude Code-native subagents, deterministic scripts, explicit rubric gate scripts, and an entry command with offline TDD coverage. The run skill drives scaffolded workflows one level deep in-session. README, plugin manifest, and WORKFLOW_DESIGN_SPEC now present the unified design -> author -> build/run -> measure -> improve lifecycle. Plan marked complete on 2026-05-30.
title: Build agent-build-scaffold + agent-build-run
